strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong track record in testing, TDD, and developer tooling (Vitest-like frameworks, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume despite being required stack
Lack of demonstrated experience with Kotlin or Java in recent roles (last Java use cited in 2018)
German language proficiency is only basic, while role is based in Berlin with enterprise collaboration
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates 6+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS, plus direct AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq — aligning strongly with core responsibilities. However, Nest.js and Vitest, explicitly required in the stack, are never mentioned; instead, he uses Ember.js and custom tooling. While he has testing expertise (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), these are D-language frameworks, not Vitest/Jest. His Java/Kotlin experience is outdated, and German language skills are insufficient for enterprise collaboration in Berlin.
